title: saxifraga cespitosa subsp. laxiuscula
intro: Saxifraga cespitosa subsp. laxiuscula, also known as the alpine saxifrage or marsh saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Saxifraga cespitosa subsp. laxiuscula include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, or salves.
